name: #13: "Scrubs to scripts" by Diana Silva and "TBC" by Ana Rodrigues
location: Vulcan Works, 34-38 Guildhall Rd, Northampton, NN1 1EW
parking: St. John's Multi Storey Car Park

schedule.title: "Scrubs to scripts" by Diana Silva
schedule.description: What happens when a healthcare worker accidentally falls down the coding rabbit hole? An interactive talk about changing careers at 25, learning to code, surviving imposter syndrome, and why saying "yes" to CS50 changed my life.
